title: Disabled Persons Scheme (DPS)
text:
Disabled Persons Scheme (DPS) - SupportGoWhere
Disabled Persons Scheme (DPS)
Share link
Eligible drivers are exempted from paying the premium for the Certificate of Entitlement (COE) and the Additional Registration Fee (ARF) when they purchase a vehicle.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Exemption from Certificate of Entitlement (COE) and Additional Registration Fee (ARF) for eligible persons with disabilities who are gainfully employed and need a vehicle to earn a living
For Singaporean Citizens with permanent physical disabilities who are medically certified as permanently disabled and incapable of taking public transport (i.e. bus and/or MRT), but fit to drive
Collapse all sections
About this support

Eligible drivers are exempted from paying the ​premium for the Certificate of Entitlement (COE) and the Additional Registration Fee (ARF) when they purchase a vehicle

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen

Persons with permanent physical disabilities who are medically certified by doctors from the Tan Tock Seng Hospital, Clinic for Advanced Rehabilitation Therapeutics (CART) as permanently disabled and incapable of taking public transport (i.e. bus and/or MRT), but fit to drive

Gainfully employed and need a vehicle to earn a living

Possesses a valid Class 3 Driving Licence

In the 30th income percentile or below where household income does not exceed $6,500 for a 4-member household

Vehicle must meet all of the following specifications:

Engine capacity must not be more than 1,600cc

Maximum power output of not more than 97kW (130bhp)

Open Market Value (OMV) of not more than S$20,000

How to apply?

For more information on the application process, please visit Enabling Guide.

Where can I find help?

View more details

SG Enable hotline: 1800-8585-885

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

contactus@sgenable.sg

Enabling Village
20 Lengkok Bahru
#01-01, Singapore 159053



Scheme last updated 29 Sep 2025
